_doc: Audit filter rules checked by .oxford/monitor.py against .oxford/audit.jsonl.

behavioral._doc: Stateless per-event pattern matching on text/thinking blocks.

rules.name: Shortcut language
rules.pattern: just wire|bolt on|easy path|already works|path of least|good enough
rules.description: Rationalization patterns seen before real shortcuts

rules.name: Self-reassurance
rules.description: Agent reassuring itself without verifying — preceded the jsonlDir shortcut

rules.name: Compat language
rules.description: Rationalizing keeping dead code for backward compatibility

rules.name: Assumed-ok
rules.pattern: should still pass|should be fine|should work
rules.description: Assuming tests pass without running them — preceded untested Fix 4

rules.name: Thinking reassurance
rules.description: Self-reassurance in internal reasoning before it reaches visible output

rules.name: Manual test only
rules.description: Plan or implementation declares a step tested manually only — skipping red-green. Pure functions in the same file inherit the gap.

rules.name: Untestable claim
rules.pattern: not directly testable|can't test|harder to test|browser context.*test
rules.description: Framing code as untestable to justify skipping tests. Pure functions in browser-context files are still testable if extracted.

companion._doc: Stateful cross-event rules. If trigger file is edited, companion file(s) must also be edited within the timeout window. 'any: true' means at least one companion suffices.

rules.name: Schema change without test
rules.description: Changing diagram types without updating any render or storage test

rules.name: Renderer change without test
rules.description: Changing the renderer without updating its tests

rules.name: Daemon change without test
rules.description: Changing the daemon without updating its tests

rules.name: Type change without renderer update
rules.description: Adding/changing a type field the renderer should know about

rules.name: Renderer change without type definition
rules.description: Renderer consuming a new field that isn't defined in types

rules.name: Storage change without test
rules.description: Changing storage I/O without updating its tests

retired._doc: Rules that were tried and found to be ineffective. Kept for history.

rules.name: No hardcoded JSONL dir
rules.reason: Fires on removal edits too — old_string triggers false positive

rules.name: Extension imports audit/
rules.reason: Same false positive on removal edits

rules.name: No auto-spawn daemon
rules.reason: Same false positive on removal edits

rules.name: StatusResult active_session
rules.reason: Fires on the edit that fixes it — better as post-hoc grep

rules.name: daemon_main validation
rules.reason: Only catches Write not Edit — better as post-hoc grep

rules.name: jsonlDir in daemon.ts
rules.reason: Fires on removal — better as post-hoc grep
